programs.title: France 24 International SBS Midday
programs.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programs.title: PBS Newshour
programs.desc: Reviews and analysis of the day's news, presented by Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett for the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS) in the United States.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: Kumi Taguchi travels to France to meet the people saving its castles. With many properties cheaper than an average Aussie home, Dateline investigates the real cost of keeping them alive.

programs.title: Insight
programs.desc: What happens when you're stuck between a rock and a hard place?

programs.title: Plat Du Tour
programs.desc: Loire Valley is known as the Garden of France. Guillaume is making a vegetarian version of the quiche Lorraine. He shares some of his mum's secret tips to create a dish to share with the whole family.

programs.title: Plat Du Tour
programs.desc: Tthe cuisine of Burgundy also has influences from Northern Europe and the Mediterranean, so what better way to celebrate than by making a rich red wine and beef stew with a surprise twist of orange.
